gist.headline: Doctor's orders: better health metrics
gist.blurb: We've tuned up our internal model monitor to better track latency and hidden legacy models. Now our operators can spot anomalies faster and keep the hive buzzing smoothly.
gist.summary: Fixed Tinybird observability pipes to accurately report average latency for successful requests and improved model catalog matching in the internal monitor.
gist.impact: Operators now have clearer visibility into model health, with accurate latency metrics and better handling of hidden or legacy models.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations.ai bee mascot acting as a doctor or mechanic, inspecting a glowing retro monitor that displays healthy green charts. The monitor robot companion is looking relieved. Medical/health checkup metaphors mixed with tech observability.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny doctor's stethoscope, inspecting a glowing retro terminal that displays healthy green charts. The chunky monitor robot companion stands nearby looking relieved and happy. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.
